SCP 0.1.3
  • Reference

    Prepare Seurat object data for the SCExplorer into hdf5 file

    PrepareSCExplorer.Rd

    Prepare Seurat object data for the SCExplorer into hdf5 file

    PrepareSCExplorer(
  object,
  base_dir = "SCExplorer",
  DataFile = "Data.hdf5",
  MetaFile = "Meta.hdf5",
  assays = "RNA",
  slots = c("counts", "data"),
  ignore_nlevel = 50,
  write_tools = FALSE,
  write_misc = FALSE,
  compression_level = 6,
  overwrite = FALSE
)

    Arguments

    overwrite

    Examples

    data("pancreas1k")
pancreas1k <- Standard_SCP(pancreas1k)
#> [2022-06-22 04:42:44] Start Standard_SCP
#> [2022-06-22 04:42:44] Checking srtList... ...
#> Data 1/1 of the srtList is raw counts. Perform NormalizeData(logCPM) on the data ...
#> Perform FindVariableFeatures on the data 1/1 of the srtList...
#> Use the separate HVF from the existed HVF in srtList...
#> [2022-06-22 04:42:46] Finished checking.
#> Perform ScaleData on the data...
#> Perform linear dimension reduction (pca) on the data...
#> Perform FindClusters (louvain) on the data...
#> Reorder clusters...
#> Perform nonlinear dimension reduction (umap) on the data...
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> [2022-06-22 04:43:02] Standard_SCP done
#> Elapsed time: 18.28 secs 
PrepareSCExplorer(pancreas1k, base_dir = "./SCExplorer")
#> Set the project name of each seurat object in the list to their dataset name
#> Write the expression matrix to hdf5 file: /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Data.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/RNA/counts already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Data.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/RNA/data already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Data.hdf5
#> Write the meta information to hdf5 file: /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/orig.ident already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/nCount_RNA already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/nFeature_RNA already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/nCount_spliced already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/nFeature_spliced already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/nCount_unspliced already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/nFeature_unspliced already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/S_score already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/G2M_score already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/Phase already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/CellType already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/SubCellType already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/Standardpca_SNN_res.0.6 already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/ident already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/Standardpcaclusters already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata/Standardclusters already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/metadata.stat already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions/PCA already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions/UMAP already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions/Standardpca already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions/StandardpcaUMAP2D already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions/StandardpcaUMAP3D already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions/StandardUMAP2D already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions/StandardUMAP3D already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
#> Group /AnnData/reductions.stat already exists in the /home/runner/work/SCP/SCP/docs/reference/SCExplorer/Meta.hdf5
